title: DocumentaryScriptAndScenes
description: Structured script + per-scene narration and image prompts for the AI video pipeline (OpenAI GPT-4o structured outputs).

full_script.description: Full narration script as continuous prose (used for TTS).

scenes.description: Ordered scenes: one still image + VO segment + optional motion intent later.

narration_text.description: Spoken lines for this scene (subset of full_script).

visual_prompt.description: Cinematic still-image prompt for ComfyUI / SDXL.

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt; use empty string if none.

approx_duration_sec.description: Target VO duration for this scene in seconds.
